content.text:
```mdl
@ Non‑Disclosure Agreement for the Exchange of Energy Management System Model Data
module contract_nli_no_align_dev_13_nda_7

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Types – domain concepts described in the NDA
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------

@ Definition of a Party (PJM or a Transmission Owner)
type Party = {
    name: string,               # e.g. "PJM", "Transmission Owner"
    is_disclosing: bool         # true if this Party is the Disclosing Party for a given exchange
}

@ Definition of a Reviewing Representative (an employee who signs a certificate)
type ReviewingRepresentative = {
    name: string,
    title: string,
    employed_by: Party,
    has_executed_certificate: bool
}

@ Definition of a Third Party (consultant, agent, professional advisor, etc.)
type ThirdParty = {
    name: string,
    relationship: string          # e.g. "consultant", "agent", "advisor"
}

@ Definition of Confidential Information (the data subject to the NDA)
type ConfidentialInfo = {
    description: string,
    is_marked_confidential: bool,
    provided_by: Party,
    received_by: Party
}

@ Event that records a disclosure of Confidential Information
type DisclosureEvent = {
    info: ConfidentialInfo,
    from_party: Party,
    to_party: Party,
    is_third_party: bool,         # true if to_party is a ThirdParty
    is_by_reviewing_rep: bool    # true if the receiver is a Reviewing Representative
}

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Entities – concrete objects that will be instantiated by the solver
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------

@ The Party that receives the Confidential Information (the “Receiving Party”)
entity receiving_party: Party

@ The Party that provides the Confidential Information (the “Disclosing Party”)
entity disclosing_party: Party

@ A Reviewing Representative of the Receiving Party
entity reviewing_rep: ReviewingRepresentative

@ A Third Party that might be contacted (consultant, agent, advisor, etc.)
entity third_party: ThirdParty

@ The Confidential Information itself
entity confidential_info: ConfidentialInfo

@ A specific disclosure event that may occur during the life of the Agreement
entity disclosure: DisclosureEvent

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Functions – helpers to keep rule bodies readable
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
func is_disclosure_to_third_party(ev: DisclosureEvent) -> bool:
    ev.is_third_party

func is_disclosure_by_reviewing_rep(ev: DisclosureEvent) -> bool:
    ev.is_by_reviewing_rep

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Rules – normative requirements extracted from the NDA
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------

@ 5. Non‑Disclosure to Third Parties
rule F no_third_party_disclosure:
    is_disclosure_to_third_party(disclosure) always

@ 2. Reviewing Representative must have executed a Non‑Disclosure Certificate
rule O reviewing_rep_must_have_certificate:
    reviewing_rep.has_executed_certificate always

@ 2. Reviewing Representative may receive Confidential Information only if needed for Transmission Functions
rule O reviewing_rep_must_need_info:
    (reviewing_rep.is_by_reviewing_rep and
     is_disclosure_by_reviewing_rep(disclosure)) always

@ 8. Confidential Information may be used only for Transmission Functions
rule O use_only_for_transmission_functions:
    (disclosure.is_by_reviewing_rep and
     reviewing_rep.employed_by = receiving_party) always

@ 9. Identification – Confidential Information must be marked as “Confidential” (or announced orally)
rule O confidential_info_must_be_marked:
    confidential_info.is_marked_confidential always

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Hypothesis – the proposition we want to test for consistency
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Hypothesis: Receiving Party may share some Confidential Information with some third‑parties
rule P share_with_third_party_allowed:
    is_disclosure_to_third_party(disclosure) always

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# End of module
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
```
